creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
Version 2.0.0.5 compiles and runs fine (except neither lightning-xpi nor enigmail work).

Versions 2.0.0.9 compiles but crashes immediately on start.  The following messages are left on the console:

jcooper@borgdemon3$ thunderbird
Type Manifest File: /home/jcooper/.thunderbird/hzm3qkjg.default/xpti.dat
*** Registering Apprunner components (all right -- a generic module!)
nsNativeComponentLoader: autoregistering begins.

++DOMWINDOW == 1
++DOMWINDOW == 2

unknown
How-To-Repeat: 

attempt to run thunderbird 2.0.0.9 on an amd64.
